data.title: Fulcrum Lithium Confirms Thick Nevada Lithium Zones and Prepares Dry Canyon Drilling
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Fulcrum Lithium Ltd. ( (AU:FUL) ).

Fulcrum Lithium reported a defining March quarter marked by completion of its Phase 3 drilling program at the Alkali Flats project in Nevada and confirmation of thick, continuous lithium mineralisation. Initial assays from 19 reverse circulation holes showed significant intervals above 300ppm lithium in 16 holes, including standout intercepts of 9.1 metres at 898ppm and 15.2 metres at 834ppm, underscoring the potential scale of the resource.

The company also validated controlled-source audio-frequency magnetotellurics (CSAMT) as a cost-effective and reliable exploration tool at Alkali Flats and has now deployed it at its Dry Canyon project to guide a maiden drilling campaign. With encouraging early exploration results at Dry Canyon and a more than doubling in lithium prices over the past year, Fulcrum is positioning its Nevada portfolio to benefit from strengthening market conditions and growing U.S. demand for domestic lithium supply.

More about Fulcrum Lithium Ltd.

Fulcrum Lithium Ltd. is an ASX-listed exploration company focused on lithium projects in Nevada, United States. The company holds 100% interests in the Alkali Flats and Dry Canyon projects, both comprising extensive lode claims on federal public lands near established lithium operations and mining service hubs.

Average Trading Volume: 59,297

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Nido Education delays AGM and reshapes CEO incentive plan
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Nido Education Limited ( (AU:NDO) ).

Nido Education has postponed its 2026 annual general meeting from 19 May to 1 June in order to give shareholders more time to review an amended Notice of Meeting and to lodge new proxy instructions. The venue is unchanged, and revised key dates will govern proxy deadlines and voting entitlements, with previously submitted proxies declared invalid for the new date.

The board has withdrawn a proposed Loan Funded Share Plan and instead will seek shareholder approval for a long-term incentive of premium options to chief executive Adam Lai under the existing Equity Incentive Plan. Priced at a roughly 65% premium to the current share price, the options will vest over three years subject to strict performance hurdles on quality, compliance, EBITDA growth and EPS, aligning executive rewards more closely with sustained shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NDO) stock is a Buy with a A$0.67 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nido Education Limited stock, see the AU:NDO Stock Forecast page.

More about Nido Education Limited

Nido Education Limited is an Australian early childhood education provider listed on the ASX under the code NDO. The company operates childcare and early learning services and focuses on delivering quality education and care in a regulated, compliance-driven market.

data.title: Yunnan Energy International Sets June 2026 AGM With Governance and Capital Mandates on Agenda
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Yunnan Energy International Co. Limited ( (HK:1298) ) has provided an update.

Yunnan Energy International Co. Limited has called its 2026 annual general meeting for 5 June 2026 in Hong Kong, to be held both physically and via live webcast or audio stream. Shareholders will review and adopt the audited consolidated financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 and the related directors’ and independent auditor’s reports.

The meeting will also vote on the re-election of executive director Yang Jie and independent non-executive directors Shi Fazhen and Jing Pilin, as well as the approval of directors’ fees of HK$450,000 for 2025. In addition, shareholders will consider re-appointing ZHONGHUI ANDA CPA Limited as auditors and granting the board broad authority to issue new shares and related instruments, potentially enhancing the company’s financing flexibility and capital management options.

More about Yunnan Energy International Co. Limited

Yunnan Energy International Co. Limited, incorporated in Bermuda and listed in both Hong Kong and Singapore, operates within the energy sector. The company serves regional markets through its international platform and maintains a governance framework overseen by an executive and independent non-executive board.

An update from Salmon Evolution ASA ( (DE:60E) ) is now available.

Salmon Evolution ASA, a listed Norwegian land-based salmon farming specialist, focuses on high-tech hybrid flow-through production, leveraging its Indre Harøy facility as a proof-of-concept hub for scalable growth in the global aquaculture market. The company aims to mitigate biological and operational risks while capitalizing on its strategic coastal location and technology-driven approach.

The company has completed a share issue at NOK 4.50 per share, with substantial allocations to primary insiders and their closely associated investment vehicles, including entities linked to the chair, CEO and several board members. This insider participation signals internal confidence in Salmon Evolution’s capital raise and growth trajectory, potentially strengthening its financial position and aligning management and shareholder interests ahead of planned expansion.

The most recent analyst rating on (DE:60E) stock is a Buy with a NOK6.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Salmon Evolution ASA stock, see the DE:60E Stock Forecast page.

More about Salmon Evolution ASA

Salmon Evolution ASA is a Norwegian aquaculture company positioned as a global leader in land-based salmon farming. Using its proprietary hybrid flow-through system, it combines elements of land- and sea-based production to optimize biological conditions and reduce operational risk, with its main industrial-scale facility and centre of excellence located on Norway’s west coast and a strategy geared toward further expansion.

Turners Automotive Group Ltd ( (NZ:TRA) ) has issued an update.

Turners Automotive Group has issued 212,523 new ordinary shares under its Dividend Reinvestment Plan in connection with the third-quarter dividend for the 2026 financial year. The new shares, priced at NZ$8.46 and representing about 0.233% of shares on issue, increase the company’s total ordinary shares to 91,287,788 and signal continued use of equity-funded dividends to support capital management and shareholder engagement.

The shares rank pari passu with existing ordinary shares, ensuring participating investors retain equal rights alongside other shareholders. By channelling dividend payments into additional equity, Turners reinforces its balance sheet while offering investors an avenue to reinvest distributions, a move that may enhance liquidity and underline confidence in the company’s long-term growth in the automotive-focused financial services market.

More about Turners Automotive Group Ltd

Turners Automotive Group Limited is an integrated financial services company focused on New Zealand’s automotive sector. The group provides a mix of vehicle-related services and financial products, positioning itself as a key player in the local market for automotive sales, finance, and related offerings.

data.title: Avecho Exceeds Phase III Insomnia Trial Target as Key Interim Read-Out Nears
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Avecho Biotechnology Limited ( (AU:AVE) ) has issued an announcement.

Avecho Biotechnology has surpassed its recruitment target for the interim analysis of its pivotal Phase III trial of a TPM-enhanced CBD soft-gel capsule for insomnia, randomising 244 patients, 16% above plan, to strengthen statistical power. The multi-centre, double-blind, placebo-controlled study, the largest CBD insomnia trial in Australia, is progressing to an interim data read-out in June 2026 under oversight from an independent Data Monitoring Board.

The company has positioned itself for commercialisation ahead of the read-out, with Sandoz AG holding Australian rights under a 10-year licensing deal that includes upfront and milestone payments plus tiered royalties. With new patent allowances in the U.S. and Europe and an Australian OTC CBD market forecast to exceed US$125 million annually within a multi-billion-dollar global insomnia segment, a positive interim result could significantly de-risk the program and accelerate Avecho’s path to market and partnering in territories outside Australia.

More about Avecho Biotechnology Limited

Avecho Biotechnology Limited is an Australian pharmaceutical company focused on developing TPM-enhanced cannabinoid formulations, including a cannabidiol (CBD) soft-gel capsule. The company targets the insomnia and broader sleep-disorder market, aiming to register its CBD product as an over-the-counter Schedule 3 medicine in Australia and to expand into major global markets.

data.title: Ore Resources launches 15,000m aircore campaign at Coolgardie gold projects
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Auroch Minerals Ltd. ( (AU:OR3) ) has shared an announcement.

Ore Resources has commenced a 15,000m regional aircore drilling programme at its Coolgardie Gold Projects in Western Australia, marking a key step in its Phase 4 exploration strategy. The initial focus is the Burbanks East Gold Project, where first‑pass drilling will test five large, structurally controlled targets along a 2.7km gold‑in‑soil anomaly adjacent to the MacPhersons Reward mine, an area that has seen limited modern exploration but has returned promising historical intercepts.

The programme will then move to high‑priority prospects at the Miriam Gold Project, including Jungle, Forrest North, Burbanks Monarch, Goroke and systematic follow‑up along the 1.7km Canyon anomaly, where prior RC drilling has already confirmed a fertile gold system. Assay results, expected from late May 2026, will shape follow‑up RC, diamond and additional aircore drilling in the second half of 2026, with the campaign positioned to unlock new high‑grade discoveries, expand resources and strengthen Ore’s strategic foothold in the WA Goldfields.

More about Auroch Minerals Ltd.

Ore Resources Ltd is an Australian gold exploration company focused on advancing its Coolgardie and Kal East Gold Projects in Western Australia’s Goldfields region. The company targets structurally controlled and intrusion-related gold systems and is currently well funded, with A$10.7 million in cash and no debt as at 31 December 2025, supporting an extensive 2026 exploration programme.

YTD Price Performance: 17.24%

Average Trading Volume: 986,039

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$56.83M

data.title: FMR Resources Wraps Phase I Drilling at Chile JV as Assays Confirm Mineralised Systems in Chile and Canada
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Applyflow Limited ( (AU:FMR) ) has issued an update.

FMR Resources reported that Phase I drilling has been completed at the Southern Porphyry target area within the Llahuin Project joint venture in Chile, where multiple porphyry intrusive phases with visible copper and molybdenite sulphides indicate the outer zones of a large mineralised system. The company is now consolidating data to design a Phase II drill program, while initial assays from the Goshen Prospect at its Fairfield Project in Canada confirm the presence of a mineralised system, and it ended the quarter with cash of $3.077 million, underpinning ongoing exploration activities.

More about Applyflow Limited

FMR Resources Limited is an Australia-based mineral exploration company focused on copper, gold and molybdenite projects. The company’s key assets include the Llahuin copper-gold-molybdenite joint venture in central Chile and the Fairfield Project in New Brunswick, Canada, positioning it within the global base and precious metals exploration sector.

Meteoric Resources NL ( (AU:MEI) ) has provided an update.

data.title: Chinney Alliance Sets 2026 AGM to Approve Dividend and Share Issuance Mandate
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Chinney Alliance Group Limited ( (HK:0385) ) has issued an announcement.

Chinney Alliance Group Limited has convened its annual general meeting for 3 June 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will review the audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 and consider a proposed final dividend. The agenda also includes re-election of directors, re-appointment of the auditor, approval of directors’ and auditor’s remuneration, and the granting of a general mandate allowing the board to issue up to 20% of the company’s existing share capital, which could provide additional financial flexibility and potential funding options.

The share issuance mandate, subject to customary exclusions for rights issues, employee share schemes and scrip dividends, will remain effective until the next annual general meeting or earlier revocation by shareholders. This proposed authority underscores the company’s intention to maintain access to equity capital markets for future corporate or strategic needs, while leaving ultimate oversight with shareholders through periodic renewal of the mandate.

More about Chinney Alliance Group Limited

Chinney Alliance Group Limited, incorporated in Bermuda and listed in Hong Kong, operates as a diversified group through its subsidiaries. The company is part of the Hong Kong market and is subject to the corporate governance and disclosure requirements of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong.
